title: ajuga chia var. intermedia
intro: Ajuga chia var. intermedia, also known as Bugleweed, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family, native to Europe and Asia. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, including antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Ajuga chia var. intermedia include reducing anxiety and stress, lowering blood pressure, and inhibiting the growth of certain bacteria and viruses. Ajuga chia var. intermedia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, tinctures, and capsules to take advantage of its medicinal properties and health benefits.
